causal_verdict.summary: Aurora still fails real sport questions primarily because they are almost never routed to analyze_match (1.8% of real-team turns). They land in clarification / conversation_assist / UNKNOWN|SMALL_TALK, which emit soft-assume meta replies, anchors, or hollow recovery — talking about the ask without answering it. Perception MVPs fixed sticky banks, not sport referent+intent binding.
